stemHtml: Under ICAO Annex 9 (Facilitation), a General Declaration for the arrival or departure of aircraft…

options.a: must be submitted for every flight to a Contracting State.
options.b: contains a list of cargo items with their Air Waybill numbers.
options.c: may be required by a Contracting State.
options.d: contains passenger names and their embarkation points.
